title: Stolen Paradise

actors: Leon Janney, Eleanor Hunt, Esther Muir
plot: Robert Gordon (Leon Janney), a sheltered 18-year-old youth reared in a Catholic school, believes he has a vocation for the priesthood. He is taken to live with his father in his palatial Florida home, where he falls in love with h...
